name: Buttermilk Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar, adding 1/2 cup at a time.
2. Blend in the vanilla extract.
3. Beat in the eggs, one at a time.
4. Combine the flour and salt; add to the creamed mixture gradually.
5. Stir in the buttermilk.
6. Sprinkle the pecans evenly over the bottom of the pie crust.
7. Pour the custard mixture over the pecans.
8. Bake at 300°F for 1 1/2 hours. Best served at room temperature with sweetened whipped cream.
